basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Palliative Care Doctor, Psychologist and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bathinda (AIIMS Bathinda)
basic_details.post_name: Palliative Care Doctor, Palliative Care Nurse, Psychologist, Physiotherapist
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bathinda (AIIMS Bathinda) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 6 Palliative Care Doctor Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with MBBS with valid registration, B.Sc Nursing/GNM with INC registration, M.A./M.Sc./M.Phil/PhD Psychology, Bachelor’s/Post Graduate in Physiotherapy qualification can directly attend the interview on 23-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with valid registration, B.Sc Nursing/GNM with INC registration, M.A./M.Sc./M.Phil/PhD Psychology, Bachelor’s/Post Graduate in Physiotherapy
qualification.details: Palliative Care Doctor: MBBS with valid state medical council registration and minimum 1-2 years of experience in a healthcare setup. Palliative Care Nurse: B.Sc. Nursing / GNM with registration under INC or State Nursing Council and minimum 2 years experience in Palliative Care. Psychologist: M.A./M.Sc./M.Phil/PhD in Psychology from a recognized university. Physiotherapist: Bachelor’s degree in Physiotherapy with 3 years experience or Post-Graduate Degree in Physiotherapy with 1 year experience and valid registration.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹ 1,00,000/- per month (consolidated) for Palliative Care Doctor, ₹ 40,000/- per month (consolidated) for Palliative Care Nurse and Psychologist, ₹ 50,000/- per month (consolidated) for Physiotherapist

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Bathinda Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Bathinda recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply on the Google Form is 23 June 2026. Candidates must ensure they submit their applications before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the walk-in interview date for the AIIMS Bathinda posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the AIIMS Bathinda recruitment will be held on 24 June 2026. Candidates should report at the specified time.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in the AIIMS Bathinda recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for various posts, including Palliative Care Doctor, Palliative Care Nurse, Psychologist, and Physiotherapist.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Palliative Care Doctor post?
faq.answer: The Palliative Care Doctor post offers a consolidated salary of ₹ 1,00,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum qualification requirements for the Palliative Care Nurse position?
faq.answer: For the Palliative Care Nurse position, candidates need to have B.Sc. Nursing / GNM with registration under INC or State Nursing Council and a minimum of 2 years of experience in Palliative Care.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Bathinda recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of AIIMS Bathinda?
faq.answer: The official website of All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bathinda is www.aiimsbathinda.edu.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will involve an Interview and potentially a Written Exam, as indicated in the official notification.
